response.global_summary: The video features the VTuber group 'Justice' (Elizabeth Rose Bloodflame, Gigi Murin, Cecilia Immergreen, and Raora Panthera) in a promotional segment discussing their 2nd anniversary and announcing the premiere of their new MV, 'SUPERNOVA SUPER GIRL'. The entire segment consists of conversational speech and interaction; there is no full vocal song performance.

scenes.description: The VTuber group 'Justice' engages in conversation, waves, and makes promotional announcements regarding their 2nd anniversary and upcoming MV premiere. The segment is entirely spoken, with no vocal music.
